body_transformation: The robust body silhouette remains intact but now features a lean, wiry frame with electric blue scales replacing the orange skin, their surfaces textured with glowing neon green circuit patterns that pulse softly. The wing membranes stretch taut and shimmer with vibrant yellow energy, their edges crackling with tiny electric sparks. The curled spiral tail tip now terminates in jagged lightning-bolt shaped spines, their surfaces covered in sharp angular textures and sparking fur tips. Pointed ears are accented with neon green circuitry tracing their length, while the head crest sharpens into a more angular, electrified form that glows faintly.
signature_feature: Tail tip spines: jagged lightning-bolt shaped spines with sparking fur tips and neon green circuit patterns.
